text: In the Execute details sidebar, the Priority should be editable - clicking on it should show a dropdown, and selecting a new priority should save that value to the server.

proposedTasks.title: Make Priority editable in Execute details sidebar
proposedTasks.description: In the Execute phase task details sidebar, replace the static Priority display with an inline-editable dropdown. Clicking the current priority value opens a dropdown showing all priority levels (0–4 with labels, e.g. 0 = Highest, 4 = Lowest). Selecting a new value optimistically updates the UI, sends a PATCH to the backend (which runs `bd update <id> --priority <n>`), and confirms or rolls back on response. Acceptance criteria: (1) Priority field shows current value as a clickable element; (2) clicking opens a dropdown with all 5 priority levels; (3) selecting a value persists via the API and updates the sidebar without a full reload; (4) dropdown closes on selection or outside click; (5) error state reverts the UI to the previous value and shows a toast.

taskTitles: Make Priority editable in Execute details sidebar
